content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

September 26, 1990

Michael J. Schroeder  
Casey, Schroeder, Knowlson,  
Mobley & Burnett  
Jamboree Center  
5 Park Plaza, Suite 800  
Irvine, CA 92714

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance  
Our File No. I-90-526

Dear Mr. Schroeder:

Thank you for your letter of July 21, 1990, in which you requested our advice concerning violations of laws arising out of the attached mailer. Your request exceeds the scope of the advice we may give, in that we are restricted to advice concerning the duties of persons under the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/

For your information, we note that the problem of improper use of donor lists, is not an issue under the Act. You may wish to contact the Federal Elections Commission, the Office of the California Attorney General, or the District Attorney of Orange County in connection with other laws which may have been violated.

If you have any questions about this letter, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

SCOTT HALLABRIN  
Acting General Counsel

By: Joseph Garcia  
Senior Commission Counsel, Legal Division

jg/docs/90526

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015.
